LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 3, 2011 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS, INCLUDING PROOF OF SERVICE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 26, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
